label: Saltstone Stores
description: Saltstone Stores serves as the residence’s primary storage chamber, carved into fused basalt behind the narrow axial hall of Termin us Shutterhouse. Deep recessed niches and salt-polished shelving are cut directly into the walls, limiting freestanding fittings under Brineshade’s persistent tidal stresses. Layered shutters and glare-baffles seal the room’s few apertures, maintaining a dim, temperature-stable interior against the mineral-laden haze and terminator contrast. The floor is laid in salt-cemented slabs scored with drainage channels to keep brine and dust from pooling in the corners.
